subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! The Dawning-Place of Glory and the Day-Spring of Revelation maketh mention of thee through verses which all who dwell on earth are powerless to reckon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد یذکرک مطلع الحمد و مشرق الوحی بایات عجز عن احصائها من فی العالم یشهد
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @exhortations and counsels, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @wisdom [hikmat]
